hero.tagline: Building modern web applications with Next.js, React, Express.js, and stable Linux infrastructure for fast, polished, production-ready experiences.

about.name: Kevin Sultana Herman
about.bio: I build end-to-end web products with a focus on performance, clean architecture, and clear user experience. My experience includes Reachable Goods for e-commerce with Midtrans integration, the Nutritional Program Foundation for operational management systems, and freelance work for a travel CRM and a US construction company website.

skills.title: Tech
skills.subtitle: Next.js, React, Express.js, Tailwind CSS, Linux, Proxmox, DevOps, and self-hosting

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.subtitle: A collection of certificates supporting web development, UI/UX, and modern frontend practice

description: Developing, maintaining, and optimizing production-scale software applications.
Developed high-performance mobile applications using React Native for both Android and iOS platforms.
Created responsive travel websites with booking features using React, Tailwind CSS, and third-party APIs.
Optimized page loading speed and SEO performance for better visibility.
